parameters.subject: Welcome to ingversions digital - Employee {{ $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.employee_id }}
parameters.html:
=

Welcome to ingversions digital!

Hello {{ $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.full_name }},

We are pleased to have you join us as {{ $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.designation }}.

Your Employee Details:

Employee ID{{ $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.employee_id }}
Department{{ $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.department }}
CTC (Annual)₹{{ $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.ctc_annual.toLocaleString('en-IN') }}

Your monthly payslips will be processed and available on the 25th of each month.

Best regards,
HR Team - ingversions digital

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Employee added successfully', employee_id: $('Validate Form Data').item.json.data.employee_id }) }}
